summary: The browser entry web exists in the image and is served from the browser host root instead of the old raw directory listing.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Project-owned browser entry files exist
checks.expected: browser_web contains the landing page and supporting CSS/JSON assets
checks.actual: browser_web now contains index.html, browser.css, defaults.json, mandatory.json, mobile-vnc.css, and mobile-vnc.js.

checks.name: CHECK-02: Runtime wiring copies browser web assets into the image
checks.expected: Dockerfile copies browser_web and entrypoint serves the custom browser web root
checks.actual: Dockerfile copies /app/browser-web and entrypoint overlays it into a custom noVNC web root before starting websockify.
